title: Python Fundamentals
description: Core Python syntax, data structures, OOP, and file I/O.

title: Advanced Python Patterns
description: Decorators, generators, async/await, context managers, and typing.

title: SQL & Relational Databases
description: SELECT, JOIN, aggregations, indexing, and query optimization basics.

title: Linear Algebra for ML
description: Vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, and matrix operations using NumPy.

title: Statistics & Probability
description: Distributions, hypothesis testing, Bayesian inference, and confidence intervals.

title: Pandas & NumPy for Data Manipulation
description: DataFrames, vectorized operations, merging, reshaping, and time series.

title: Feature Engineering & Pipelines
description: Encoding, imputation, scaling, feature selection, and sklearn Pipelines.

title: Scikit-learn: Core ML Patterns
description: Supervised and unsupervised algorithms, cross-validation, and hyperparameter tuning.

title: Model Evaluation & Validation
description: AUC-ROC, precision/recall, learning curves, confusion matrices, and business metrics.

title: PyTorch Fundamentals
description: Tensors, autograd, nn.Module, training loops, and GPU acceleration.

title: Transformers & Modern LLM Architecture
description: Attention mechanisms, positional encoding, BERT, GPT, and fine-tuning with HuggingFace.

title: MLOps: MLflow, Docker & CI/CD
description: Experiment tracking, model registry, containerization, and automated deployment pipelines.

title: A/B Testing & Statistical Significance
description: Experiment design, power analysis, p-values, and causal inference frameworks.

title: NLP Fundamentals with HuggingFace
description: Tokenization, embeddings, text classification, NER, and sentiment analysis.

title: Docker Deep Dive
description: Images, containers, volumes, networking, multi-stage builds, and Docker Compose.

title: Kubernetes: Workloads & Networking
description: Pods, deployments, services, ingress, ConfigMaps, RBAC, and Helm charts.

title: Terraform: Infrastructure as Code
description: HCL syntax, providers, state management, modules, and cloud resource provisioning.

title: CI/CD Pipelines: GitHub Actions & ArgoCD
description: Pipeline design, GitOps patterns, blue-green deployments, and rollback strategies.

title: Prometheus, Grafana & Observability
description: Metrics, alerting, dashboards, distributed tracing, and SRE fundamentals.

title: Fundamentals of People Management
description: Conflict resolution, performance conversations, coaching, team motivation, and delegation.

title: WMS Software: Advanced Workflows
description: Receiving, putaway optimization, cycle count procedures, and exception handling.

title: SAP Warehouse Management (WM/EWM)
description: SAP WM/EWM navigation, transfer orders, inventory management, and reporting.

title: Lean Six Sigma: Yellow Belt
description: DMAIC methodology, waste identification, process mapping, and control charts.

title: KPI Reporting & Operational Analytics
description: OTP, pick accuracy, shrinkage metrics, dashboard creation, and data-driven decisions.

title: Loss Prevention & Shrink Reduction
description: Asset protection strategies, security protocols, and audit procedures.

title: Supply Chain Fundamentals
description: Demand forecasting, vendor management, procurement cycles, and logistics coordination.

title: Enterprise Sales Fundamentals
description: Consultative selling, discovery calls, objection handling, and deal qualification (MEDDIC).

title: CRM & Salesforce Essentials
description: Pipeline management, forecasting, activity logging, and Salesforce reports.
